kh-subtitle: Every trophy, command, record, treasure and mission in one checklist — per character, saved in your browser. Commands you meld in the melding calculator are marked unlocked here automatically. Checklist data from xenodusk's completion guide.
bt-reset-confirm: Reset ALL tracker progress for every character? (Melding calculator data is kept.)
bt-badge-meld-tip: Marked as owned in the melding calculator
bt-badge-mission-tip: Unlocked by reaching max rank on its Unversed mission
bt-ingame-hint: In-game trophies have no platform achievement counterpart, but they count toward 100% completion in the Trinity Archives and several award commands.
bt-legend-commands: MELDED = marked as owned in the melding calculator. MAX RANK = earned from an Unversed mission high score (Unversed tab). TREASURE = dropped by a checked treasure chest (Treasures tab). Auto-unlocked rows can't be unchecked here — update them at their source.
bt-missions-hint: Each character must complete every mission once, and every mission rewards a Battle Command at max rank (high score). Reaching max rank as %1 marks that command as unlocked in %1's Command Collection. Max rank by any one character is enough for the Savage Slayer trophy.
bt-reward-tip: Battle Command awarded at max rank — this one needs the high score
bt-legend-missions: Savage Slayer trophy: %1 / %2 missions at max rank by at least one character.
bt-badge-treasure-tip: Dropped by a treasure chest you've checked off
bt-legend-treasures: Checking a chest whose reward is a command marks that command as unlocked on the Commands tab.
kp-note: Backs up / restores ALL Kingdom Hearts tracker progress on this site as a JSON file.
kp-import-confirm: Importing will overwrite the saved progress of every KH tool on this site with the file's contents. Continue?
kp-import-error: That file could not be read as a progress export.
